requirements: Build an AI-based weather app which would update weather hourly

user_stories.title: AI-based weather app with hourly updates
user_stories.goal: To access hourly weather updates using an AI-powered weather app
user_stories.benefit: Improved weather forecasting accuracy and convenience for users
acceptance_criteria: The app should be able to provide hourly weather updates
The AI model should accurately predict weather conditions
The app should display the current weather conditions and hourly forecasts
Users should be able to view the forecast for the next 24 hours
The app should provide notifications for severe weather alerts

user_stories.title: Integration of external weather data sources
user_stories.goal: To integrate external weather data sources into the AI-based weather app
user_stories.benefit: Improved accuracy and reliability of weather data
acceptance_criteria: The app should be able to fetch weather data from multiple external sources
The app should be able to handle data from different formats and APIs
The app should validate and clean the data before processing it
The app should store the fetched data in a database for future use

user_stories.title: Implement machine learning model for weather prediction
user_stories.goal: To implement a machine learning model for weather prediction in the AI-based weather app
user_stories.benefit: Improved accuracy and reliability of weather forecasts
acceptance_criteria: The machine learning model should be able to process historical weather data
The model should be able to learn from new data and update predictions accordingly
The model should be able to handle missing data points
The model should provide accurate predictions for at least 80% of the cases

user_stories.title: Design and develop user interface for hourly weather forecasts
user_stories.goal: To design and develop a user interface for displaying hourly weather forecasts in the AI-based weather app
acceptance_criteria: The user interface should display hourly weather forecasts in a clear and concise manner
The user interface should be responsive and adapt to different screen sizes
The user interface should provide options to customize the display of weather information
The user interface should be accessible to users with disabilities

user_stories.title: Implement notifications for severe weather alerts
user_stories.goal: To implement notifications for severe weather alerts in the AI-based weather app
user_stories.benefit: Improved safety and preparedness for users
acceptance_criteria: The app should be able to fetch severe weather alerts from reliable sources
The app should provide notifications for severe weather alerts in real-time
The app should allow users to customize notification preferences
The app should provide options to snooze or dismiss notifications

code_artifacts.summary: To access hourly weather updates using an AI-powered weather app
To integrate external weather data sources into the AI-based weather app
To implement a machine learning model for weather prediction in the AI-based weather app
To design and develop a user interface for displaying hourly weather forecasts in the AI-based weather app
To implement notifications for severe weather alerts in the AI-based weather app
